title: site-shield-map
description: Collects data for a single Site Shield request map.

acknowledgeRequiredBy.description: Specifies the due date and time for when the proposed firewall addresses should be acknowledged.

acknowledged.description: Whether the given set of proposed firewall addresses are acknowledged.

acknowledgedBy.description: Specifies the email of the user who acknowledged the previous proposed firewall addresses.

acknowledgedOn.description: Specifies the date and time when proposed CIDR blocks were acknowledged.

contacts.description: A list of subscribed user email addresses.

items.description: An email address of a subscribed user.

currentCidrs.description: A list of current CIDR blocks of firewall addresses.

items.description: A current CIDR block of firewall addresses.

latestTicketId.description: Identifies the most recent map request ticket.

mapAlias.description: A unique, recognizable name for the map.

mcmMapRuleId.description: Identifies the Map Configuration Management (MCM) map rule.

proposedCidrs.description: CIDR blocks containing the Akamai-proposed firewall addresses.

items.description: A CIDR block of the Akamai-proposed firewall addresses.

ruleName.description: Identifies the hostname for the Site Shield map, available from your Akamai representative. Use the `ruleName` to configure the [Site Shield behavior in PAPI](https://techdocs.akamai.com/property-mgr/reference/latest-site-shield).

service.description: Indicates the network, either `C` for `script`, `S` for `ESSL`, or `W` for `FreeFlow`.

shared.description: Indicates whether the map is active in shared.

sureRouteName.description: The name of the SureRoute map.
